language.title: Language
language.zhCNTip: Switch interface language to Simplified Chinese
language.zhHKTip: Switch interface language to Traditional Chinese

view.title: Default View
view.terminalTip: Set default view to Terminal logs only
view.waveformTip: Set default view to Waveform chart only
view.splitTip: Set default view to Split terminal and waveform columns

general.closeToTrayTip: When enabled, closing the window hides it to the system tray, keeping the application running in the background
general.autostartTip: When enabled, the application will automatically launch on system startup
general.maxLogsTip: Configure maximum logs retained in the terminal memory, current is {{val}} rows

serial.title: Serial Config
serial.rawDataDesc: If you only use OxideSerial as a serial debugger and do not parse any sample data, please use this protocol.
serial.rawDataExample: RawData does not parse sample data. The RawData protocol is suitable for needs where data parsing is not required and only the byte stream is viewed.
serial.justFloatFdataDesc: is a little-endian float array, containing the
serial.fireWaterWarning: Note: FireWater only prints data when it encounters a newline character. Many new users get confused here.
serial.dataInterfaceSub: Physical interface for target device communication
serial.portSelectTip: Select serial device port number to connect
serial.refreshTip: Scan and refresh available serial ports list
serial.dataBitsTip: Communication data bits, default is usually 8
serial.stopBitsTip: Communication stop bits, default is usually 1
serial.parityTip: Parity mode, default is usually None
serial.protocolSelectTip: Select protocol engine for waveform/logs analysis
serial.canDesc: This feature is planned and will be added in a future update.
serial.canUpcomingDesc: CAN bus monitoring is planned and will be available in a future update.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.autoScrollLocked: Auto Scroll Locked, click to return to bottom

waveform.title: Waveform
waveform.clearTooltip:
Left click: Clear sample data
Right click: Set do not warn
waveform.visiblePointsTooltip: Data points visible in current screen area
waveform.deltaTTooltip: Set minimum interval (ms) for waveform rendering. Lower means higher frequency. Default is 50ms (20Hz)
waveform.bufferLimitTooltip: Set maximum sample points retained in memory per channel. Exceeded old data is discarded. Default is 50000
waveform.autoPointsTooltip: Set data points count to display in X-axis visible area under Auto mode. Default is 100
waveform.downsampleTooltip: Enable high-performance MinMax downsampling to reduce GPU usage under large buffers while preserving signal peaks

modbus.title: Modbus RTU
modbus.inputError: Invalid input format, check data type!
modbus.pollIntervalTip: Set the cycle period (ms) for Modbus master polling all registers
modbus.byteOrderTip: Set the byte order (Endian) for 32-bit double words or float values in serial transmission
modbus.stopPollTip: Stop current polling for Modbus registers
modbus.startPollTip: Start polling to automatically read registers based on interval
modbus.regNameTip: Assign a friendly alias for the register
modbus.dataTypeTip: Select physical data format for register values (e.g. 16-bit word, 32-bit dword, float)
modbus.functionCodeTip: Specify read function code used to read this register
modbus.addRegBtnTip: Add this register configuration to the monitor list below
modbus.exportJSONTip: Export all register configurations in current M table as a JSON file
modbus.importJSONTip: Import JSON configuration file to restore registers list
modbus.clearAllBtnTip: Delete all registers from the monitor table below
modbus.emptyList: Monitoring list is empty. Please configure and "Add Register" from the left sidebar.
modbus.doubleClickTip: 💡 Quick Tip: Double-click the [Alias] or [Address] inside a row to edit it directly online.

header.viewSplitTip: Show both terminal logs and waveform chart

quickSendHelpDesc1: 1. **Quick Send**: Click the [Send] button next to a row to transmit its data to the serial port immediately.
quickSendHelpDesc2: 2. **Edit Comment**: Double-click on any comment cell to modify its annotation in-place.
quickSendHelpDesc3: 3. **Cycle Send**: Checking [Cycle Send] at the bottom will filter all rows with a [Seq] greater than 0, sort them ascendingly, and transmit them sequentially, waiting for the configured delay after each transmission.
quickSendHelpDesc4: 4. **Import/Export**: Supports batch import and export of quick command lists using standard .ini configuration files.
